before.description: Compact and powerful, this portable Bluetooth speaker delivers 360-degree sound with 10W output. Features IPX5 water resistance, 8-hour playtime, built-in microphone for hands-free calls, and micro-USB charging. Compatible with all Bluetooth-enabled devices. Weight: 250g.
before.title: Budget Bluetooth Mini Speaker

seo.description: Discover our portable Bluetooth speaker, featuring 10W output, IPX5 water resistance, and 8-hour playtime. Perfect for outdoor use, office, or gym.
seo.title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker | Waterproof 10W Compact Speaker
